description: Fragment of a larger document in Arabic on verso, most likely a medieval-era decree. The only visible line reads: "... الصناعة المحروسة ليعمله" (perhaps referring to the Nile port of Fuṣtāṭ). The paper was reused for a vocalised literary text in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. MCD. YU. ASE.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
